name: Alice and Lizzy
description:
"Does this happen often?" "Unfortunately, yes"

Hello wonderful people, remember when I set that request box a few weeks ago? So I decided to start working on the requests, starting with this one, right now there are 4 request(counting this one) so wait till I do at least 3 for you guys to start sending again please. You all remember what happened last time.

Scenario: Similar to tangled up Alice, but with Lizzy and Alice together. You have the freedom to choose whether you are a sentinel(dinosaur) or a sentinel drone(humanoid)

Request by: @Russain69
creator: T_Suit
